commands: vite install # should install packages first
vite pm list # should list current workspace root dependencies
vite pm list --recursive # should list all packages in workspace recursively
vite pm list --filter app # should list specific workspace package (uses --filter app list)
vite pm list --filter app --filter @vite-plus-test/utils # should list multiple workspace packages
vite pm list --recursive --json # should list all workspace packages in JSON format
vite pm list --recursive --depth 0 # should list workspace packages with depth limit
vite pm list --recursive --only-projects # should list only workspace projects (pnpm-specific)
vite pm list --recursive --exclude-peers # should exclude peer dependencies in workspace
vite pm list --recursive --prod # should list production dependencies in workspace
